name: FoodSafety
description: An early concept mentioned in a knowledge text: FoodSafety.

open_questions.question: FoodSafety 是什么？它和当前学习主题有什么关系？
FoodSafety 是不是一种 Fruit，还是和 Fruit 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: This question needs more evidence. Treat the concept as temporarily unknown, record possible relations to known concepts, and continue looking for evidence.

open_questions.question: FoodSafety 是不是一种 Nutrient，还是和 Nutrient 不同？
open_questions.last_answer: Nutrient is not a fruit. Nutrient is a general category for substances that support BodyFunction and Health. Vitamin is a nutrient. Mineral is a nutrient. DietaryFiber is a nutrient. Potassium is a nutrient.
